moments.title: World Cup 2026 Knockout Stages Begin
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 moves into its high-stakes knockout phase with the Round of 32 starting on June 28, followed by the Round of 16 from July 4 and Quarter-finals from July 9.

angles.name: Knockout Excitement
angles.copy: The World Cup 2026 knockout stages are HERE! Every game is now do-or-die. Who are you backing to make it to the Quarter-finals?

angles.name: England's Journey
angles.copy: England are in the knockout stages of the World Cup! The dream continues. How far do you think they can go?

angles.name: Weekend Football
angles.copy: Epic World Cup football coming this weekend with the Round of 16 kicking off! Clear your schedules, it's going to be huge.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Underway
moments.blurb: The 139th edition of The Wimbledon Championships is currently underway at the All England Club in London, running from June 29 to July 12, 2026.

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: It's Wimbledon week! The grass courts are buzzing with action. Who are you cheering on for the title?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Our British tennis stars are battling it out at Wimbledon. Fingers crossed for some incredible performances this week!

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Nothing says British summer like Wimbledon. Time for strawberries, cream, and world-class tennis! What's your favourite Wimbledon tradition?

moments.title: Tour de France 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins on July 4, 2026, with the Grand Départ in Barcelona, running until July 26.

angles.name: Tour Start
angles.copy: The greatest cycling race on Earth, the Tour de France, starts this Thursday! Get ready for three weeks of epic climbs and sprint finishes.

angles.name: Barcelona Grand Départ
angles.copy: This year's Tour de France kicks off in Barcelona! What an incredible backdrop for the start of such a legendary race.

angles.name: Cycling Spectacle
angles.copy: From the mountains to the sprints, the Tour de France is an incredible spectacle of human endurance. Who's your pick for the Yellow Jersey?

moments.title: Debbie Harry's 81st Birthday
moments.blurb: Blondie frontwoman and music icon Debbie Harry celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Debbie Harry! The ultimate punk icon and lead singer of Blondie, still ruling the airwaves.

angles.name: Heart of Glass
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry! From 'Heart of Glass' to 'Rapture', her influence is undeniable.

angles.name: Timeless Style
angles.copy: An icon of music and style, Debbie Harry turns 81 today! Celebrate with us by cranking your favourite Blondie track.

moments.title: Lindsay Lohan's 40th Birthday
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Lindsay Lohan celebrates her 40th birthday on July 2, 2026.

angles.name: 00s Pop Princess
angles.copy: It's Lindsay Lohan's 40th Birthday tomorrow! From 'Mean Girls' to 'Confessions of a Teenage Drama Queen', she defined a generation.

angles.name: Pop Hits
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to Lindsay Lohan! Who remembers her pop hits like 'Rumors' and 'Bossy'? Still bang.

angles.name: Millennial Icon
angles.copy: Lindsay Lohan turns the big 4-0! A true millennial icon who shaped our childhoods and gave us some unforgettable movie moments.

moments.title: Huey Lewis's 76th Birthday
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5, 2026.

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the one and only Huey Lewis! 'The Power of Love' is still an absolute anthem.

angles.name: Back to the Future Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 76th Birthday to Huey Lewis! Forever tied to 'Back to the Future' and timeless rock & roll.

angles.name: Heart of Rock & Roll
angles.copy: Celebrate Huey Lewis's birthday by turning up some Huey Lewis and the News! What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Post Malone's 31st Birthday
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on July 6, 2026.

angles.name: Genre-Bending Star
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the incredible Post Malone! Always pushing boundaries and delivering massive hits.

angles.name: Birthday Anthems
angles.copy: Wishing Post Malone a very Happy 31st Birthday! Time to put on 'Circles' or 'Sunflower' and celebrate.

angles.name: Pop Culture Icon
angles.copy: Post Malone turns 31! A true pop culture icon with a sound all his own. What's your top Posty track?

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Drummer for the greatest band in history, The Beatles.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Ringo Starr! Join us in sending him 'Peace and Love' today.

angles.name: Solo Hits
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86! Let's celebrate his incredible career, from The Beatles to his brilliant solo work like 'Photograph'.

moments.title: Courtney Love's 62nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and grunge icon Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the unforgettable Courtney Love! A true force of nature and grunge rock royalty.

angles.name: Hole's Legacy
angles.copy: Wishing a Happy Birthday to Courtney Love! Relive the raw power of Hole and her iconic 90s sound.

angles.name: Influential Artist
angles.copy: Courtney Love turns 62 today! Her influence on alternative music and female artists is immeasurable.

moments.title: Marc Almond's 69th Birthday
moments.blurb: Soft Cell frontman and acclaimed solo artist Marc Almond celebrates his 69th birthday on July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the legendary Marc Almond! From Soft Cell's 'Tainted Love' to his incredible solo career, a true pioneer.

angles.name: Distinctive Voice
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 69th Birthday to Marc Almond! His distinctive voice and captivating performances have left an indelible mark on music.

angles.name: Music Chameleon
angles.copy: Celebrate Marc Almond's birthday with some of his timeless tracks. A musical chameleon who effortlessly spans genres!
